div1.entryFree: Hent, vb. to take, to clear, to pass beyond: jog on the footpath way, and merrily h. the stile-a, Wint. IV, 3, 133. Unchanged in the partic.: the generous and gravest citizens have h. the gates, and very near upon the duke is entering, Meas. IV, 6, 14 (have gone beyond, out of the gates to meet the duke).
